Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson

Record Class HjsonTokenizer.Token

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson.HjsonTokenizer.Token
Record Components:
type - Token type.
stringValue - String value for STRING, QUOTELESS, MULTILINE tokens; null otherwise.
numberValue - Number value for NUMBER tokens; null otherwise.
Enclosing class:
HjsonTokenizer
public static record HjsonTokenizer.Token(HjsonTokenizer.TokenType type, String stringValue, Number numberValue) extends Record
A token with optional string or number value.

  • Constructor Details

    • Token

      public Token(HjsonTokenizer.TokenType type, String stringValue, Number numberValue)
      Creates an instance of a Token record class.
      Parameters:
      type - the value for the type record component
      stringValue - the value for the stringValue record component
      numberValue - the value for the numberValue record component

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static HjsonTokenizer.Token of(HjsonTokenizer.TokenType type)
      Creates a structural or literal token with no value.
      Parameters:
      type - Token type.
      Returns:
      A new token.

    • string

      public static HjsonTokenizer.Token string(String value)
      Creates a quoted-string token.
      Parameters:
      value - The string value.
      Returns:
      A new token.

    • quoteless

      public static HjsonTokenizer.Token quoteless(String value)
      Creates a quoteless-string token.
      Parameters:
      value - The string value.
      Returns:
      A new token.

    • multiline

      public static HjsonTokenizer.Token multiline(String value)
      Creates a multiline-string token.
      Parameters:
      value - The string value.
      Returns:
      A new token.

    • number

      public static HjsonTokenizer.Token number(Number value)
      Creates a number token.
      Parameters:
      value - The number value.
      Returns:
      A new token.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

    • type

      public HjsonTokenizer.TokenType type()
      Returns the value of the type record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the type record component

      public String stringValue()
      Returns the value of the stringValue record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the stringValue record component

    • numberValue

      public Number numberValue()
      Returns the value of the numberValue record component.
